name: Solo Belt-Clip Carry Case
summary: Solo Belt-Clip Carry Case — a carry case for carrying your kit safely.
description: The Solo Belt-Clip Carry Case enables easy transportation and accessibility of your Arizer Solo 3, Solo 2 Max, Solo 2 vaporiser and two pre-loaded Glass Aroma Tubes. It can be conveniently clipped onto your belt, making transport effortless and efficient. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. Keeps your kit protected and discreet in transit.
